levelName: Level 20: Type Casting - Int to Double
puzzleDescription: Learn how to convert a whole number (int) into a decimal number (double). This is called widening casting in Java.
objective: Convert an `int` value to `double` and print the result.
hints: Declare a double variable (e.g., double myDouble = myInt;).
Java automatically converts int to double since double is larger.
Pass the new double variable into the System.out.println() method.
